(AMENDED) NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION WITH PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT TELEGIN, EUGENE AN UNDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT EUGENE TELEGIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IMMEDIATELY TO SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITION. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $689 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition With Production Of Documents, Responses To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Eugene Telegin's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and appearance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Counsel for plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant immediately to schedule the deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $689 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
